channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: mauriceboe/TREK
item.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: meodai/heerich
item.description: Tiny engine for 3D voxel scenes rendered to SVG — boolean ops, oblique/perspective cameras, zero dependencies. Inspired by the geometric cardboard sculptures of Erwin Heerich.

item.title: revfactory/harness
item.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.

item.title: ShawnPana/smux
item.description: tmux config with built-in terminal automation and agent-to-agent communication.

item.title: chenglou/pretext
item.description: (no description)

item.title: AvdLee/Xcode-Build-Optimization-Agent-Skill
item.description: An Agent Skill helping you to optimize Xcode incremental and clean builds by running benchmarks and optimizing build settings.

item.title: elder-plinius/G0DM0D3
item.description: LIBERATED AI CHAT

item.title: adamlyttleapps/notchy
item.description: (no description)

item.title: larksuite/cli
item.description: A command-line tool for Lark/Feishu Open Platform — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills.

item.title: zc-zhangchen/any-auto-register
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli
item.description: DingTalk Workspace is an officially open-sourced cross-platform CLI tool from DingTalk. It unifies DingTalk’s full suite of product capabilities into a single package, is designed for both human users and AI agent scenarios.

item.title: tiajinsha/JKVideo
item.description: (no description)

item.title: magnum6actual/flipoff
item.description: Free split-flap display emulator for any TV. The classic flip-board look, without the $3,500 hardware.

item.title: Michaelliv/markit
item.description: 🖍️ Convert anything to markdown. Mark it.

item.title: jxnxts/mcp-brasil
item.description: MCP Server para 27 APIs públicas brasileiras

item.title: getcompanion-ai/feynman
item.description: (no description)

item.title: alvinunreal/awesome-opensource-ai
item.description: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.

item.title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
item.description: (no description)

item.title: millionco/expect
item.description: Let agents test your code in a real browser

item.title: nashsu/opencli-rs
item.description: Opencli-rs is a Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl)

item.title: greensock/gsap-skills
item.description: Official AI skills for GSAP. These skills teach AI coding agents how to correctly use GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform), including best practices, common animation patterns, and plugin usage.

item.title: HKUDS/OpenSpace
item.description: "OpenSpace: Make Your Agents: Smarter, Low-Cost, Self-Evolving" -- Community: https://open-space.cloud/

item.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
item.description: Local knowledge graph for Claude Code. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so Claude reads only what matters — 6.8× fewer tokens on reviews and up to 49× on daily coding tasks.

item.title: marswaveai/TypeNo
item.description: A free, open source, privacy-first voice input app for macOS.

item.title: danveloper/flash-moe
item.description: Running a big model on a small laptop

item.title: zarazhangrui/codebase-to-course
item.description: A Claude Code skill that turns any codebase into a beautiful, interactive single-page HTML course for non-technical vibe coders.

item.title: facebookresearch/HyperAgents
item.description: Self-referential self-improving agents that can optimize for any computable task

item.title: NVIDIA/NemoClaw
item.description: Run OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference

item.title: microsoft/RustTraining
item.description: Beginner, advanced, expert level Rust training material

item.title: slavingia/skills
item.description: Claude Code skills based on The Minimalist Entrepreneur by Sahil Lavingia

item.title: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
item.description: Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞

item.title: jackwener/opencli
item.description: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

item.title: pascalorg/editor
item.description: (no description)

item.title: fastclaw-ai/weclaw
item.description: Connect to any agents with WeChat ClawBot.

item.title: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
item.description: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 48 AI agents, 36 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

item.title: nexu-io/nexu
item.description: The simplest desktop client for OpenClaw 🦞 — bridge your Agent to WeChat, Feishu, Slack & Discord in one click. Works with Claude Code, Codex & any LLM. BYOK, local-first, chat from your phone 24/7.

item.title: MiniMax-AI/skills
item.description: (no description)
